codeReview.summary: The rerun directly addresses the prior blocking issue from `mcp-error-handling`: `fleet_status` now formats connectivity failures from the typed SSH error union into redacted, actionable per-host messages instead of collapsing them to `Host unreachable`, and the new regression tests cover the main failure shapes that motivated the rerun. I did not find a remaining blocking defect in the scope of this fix.

issues.description: The rerun adds regression coverage for `ConnectionTimeout`, `ConnectionFailed`, and `CommandFailed`, but there is still no explicit `CommandTimeout` test even though `formatSshError` special-cases that branch in `apps/mcp-server/src/server.ts:176-178`. The implementation looks correct, but a dedicated test would better lock in the promised timeout/command-detail behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `mcp-worker` skill still defines manual verification as initialize/tools-list smoke checks only. In this fix session, the worker followed that guidance and recorded only initialize/tools-list manual checks, so there was still no manual probe of a feature-relevant `fleet_status` error path even though the shared library now recommends invoking at least one feature-relevant tool.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/mcp-worker/SKILL.md:90-104 only prescribes initialize/tools-list; /home/shuv/.factory/missions/53d67669-5ba8-4745-9fd5-71906b40773d/handoffs/2026-03-16T00-52-29-433Z__fix-mcp-error-context__68152389-33d2-4d2f-847f-65f8cd6b95e1.json records only initialize/tools-list manual checks; .factory/library/user-testing.md:36-38 now recommends initialize -> notifications/initialized -> tools/list -> a feature-relevant tools/call.

summary: Pass. Compared with the original `mcp-error-handling` failure, commit `be1439d` removes the generic `Host unreachable` collapse and now returns redacted, actionable SSH failure context for `fleet_status`, so the original blocking issue this rerun targeted is fixed. The only remaining note in scope is a non-blocking regression-test gap for the `CommandTimeout` branch.
